package day4;

public class Program5_largestOfDigit {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		
	     int num=59371;
	     int largest=0;
	     int digit=0;
	     for(;num>0;)
	     {
	     digit=num%10;
	     if(digit>largest)
	     {
	    	 largest=digit;
	     }
	     num=num/10;
	     }
	     System.out.println("The largest digit is: " + largest);
	}

}
